title: lophogyne helicandra
intro: Lophogyne helicandra, also known as the Himalayan winter cherry, is a plant species belonging to the family Lophogyneceae. It is primarily used in Ayurvedic medicine and traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. Lophogyne helicandra is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Lophogyne helicandra are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, and it is also used to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being.
